since_last: 42% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.88%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.02% · BTC -2.39% · Gold -0.95% · Nasdaq100 -2.69%. 42% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.88%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.88%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.48%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.49% at $156.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
